# SOP: Site Relocator for PaintCare

There’s a “site-index” variable that is set within /assets-reuse-only/js/app.c2192c49.js that may need to be updated whenever a fresh site locator is uploaded to the server. See attached screenshot.

Also make sure to check the /paintshare/ page to verify that the assets-reuse-only locator didn’t break.

History in task <https://app.productive.io/2650-4site-interactive-studios-inc/tasks/15244867>
